summary: Verified all 12 features for Coming Soon overlays, Tutorial system, and Multi-user storage. All features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: TutorialOverlay has 5 clickable dots with data-testid='tutorial-dot-0' through 'tutorial-dot-4' (lines 149-157)
VERIFIED: TutorialOverlay has tutorial-next-btn (line 213), tutorial-skip-btn (line 137), tutorial-prev-btn (line 193)
VERIFIED: Tutorial shows 5 steps: TRUCK PROFILE, COMMAND CENTER, NAVIGATION VIEW, DISPLAY LAYOUT, FUEL NETWORK (TUTORIAL_STEPS array lines 17-58)
VERIFIED: Tutorial completion stored in localStorage with user-scoped key '{uid}_tutorial_completed' (line 71, 93)
VERIFIED: SettingsView has replay-tutorial-btn (line 586) that triggers onReplayTutorial prop
VERIFIED: userStorage.ts exports getUserStorageKey, setCurrentUserId, migrateLocalStorageForUser (lines 8, 21, 51)
VERIFIED: hudLayout.ts uses userKey() helper which calls getUserStorageKey (line 34-36)
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx uses uKey/uGet/uSet helpers for user-scoped localStorage (lines 431-434)
VERIFIED: MapControls.tsx uses getUserStorageKey for localStorage operations (lines 82, 193, 309)
VERIFIED: LoadBoard.tsx uses getUserStorageKey for truck_target_rate/truck_max_weight (lines 319-324)
VERIFIED: OfflineMapsView.tsx uses getUserStorageKey for cached regions/routes (lines 47, 53, 58, 64)

test_credentials.guest: Click 'Continue as Guest' button on login screen

context_for_next_testing_agent: All Coming Soon, Tutorial, and Multi-user storage features verified. The app uses Firebase UID-prefixed localStorage keys for user isolation (e.g., '{uid}_tutorial_completed'). Tutorial shows on first login and can be replayed via Settings > Replay Tutorial button.

feature_1_coming_soon_load_board.details: Coming Soon overlay visible on Load Board with data-testid='coming-soon-overlay', shows 'LOAD BOARD - COMING SOON'

feature_2_coming_soon_truck_stops.details: Coming Soon overlay visible on Truck Stops with data-testid='coming-soon-overlay', shows 'TRUCK STOPS - COMING SOON'

feature_3_tutorial_first_login.details: Tutorial overlay appears on first login with data-testid='tutorial-overlay', shows 'TRUCK PROFILE' as step 1/5

feature_4_tutorial_dots.details: All 5 clickable progress dots found (tutorial-dot-0 through tutorial-dot-4)

feature_5_tutorial_next_button.details: Next button (tutorial-next-btn) advances through all 5 steps correctly

feature_7_tutorial_persistence.details: Tutorial does NOT show again after completion - localStorage key '{uid}_tutorial_completed' = 'true' verified

feature_8_replay_tutorial_button.details: Settings view has 'Replay Tutorial' button with data-testid='replay-tutorial-btn'

feature_9_replay_tutorial_function.details: Clicking Replay Tutorial reopens the tutorial overlay

feature_10_user_storage_exports.details: userStorage.ts exports getUserStorageKey, setCurrentUserId, migrateLocalStorageForUser - verified in code

feature_11_hud_layout_user_scoped.details: hudLayout.ts uses userKey() helper which calls getUserStorageKey for all load/save operations

feature_12_navigation_view_user_scoped.details: NavigationView.tsx uses uKey/uGet/uSet helpers for all localStorage operations (lines 431-434)

mocked_apis.none: No mocked APIs - all integrations are live

known_issues.gemini_api_key: Gemini API key reported as leaked - voice guidance falls back to native TTS. Non-blocking issue (known from previous iterations).
